results.title: Sen Bartekwa: “Critical Sectors Need Radical Privatization“
results.description: Grand Kru Senator Bartekwa urges aggressive privatization in Liberia's struggling public utilities, citing the success of private sector involvement in the telecom industry and advocating for private investment partnerships.

results.title: Ved Prakash Verma Gets Additional Charge as BPCL CVO
results.description: The Government of India has entrusted additional charge of Chief Vigilance Officer (CVO) of BPCL to Ved Prakash Verma, ITS (1995), currently serving as CVO of HPCL, for six months.

results.title: EFICYENT Marks Global Presence at Money20/20 Asia and Money20/20 Europe
results.description: DUBAI, UAE, May 27, 2026 /PRNewswire/ — Cross-border payments platform continues international fintech engagement across Asia and Europe EFICYENT, a cross-border payments and fintech platform, recently participated in the Money20/20 Asia in Bangkok and is now attending Money20/20 Europe in Amsterdam as part of its ongoing global expansion efforts. The company’s participation at Money20/20 Asia [...]

results.title: Azeri Light slips over 3% in latest trading update
results.description: The price of Azerbaijan’s “Azeri Light” crude oil at Italy’s Augusta port under CIF conditions has fallen by $3.57, or 3.24%, compared to the previous figure, reaching $106.48 per barrel.

results.title: COTU Lobbies for Tax Relief on Workers Earning Up to Sh60,000 Monthly
results.description: NAIROBI, Kenya, May 27– The Central Organization of Trade Unions Kenya (COTU-K) now wants Parliament to revise PAYE bands for workers earning up to Sh60,000 monthly, arguing that the Finance Bill 2026 has failed to address mounting pressure on salaried Kenyans facing rising living costs and multiple statutory deductions. In its submissions to Parliament on [...]

results.title: Xiaomi reports INR 139532.8 crore revenue in Q1 2026 as smartphone and EV sales rise
results.description: Xiaomi posted solid Q1 2026 results, with INR 139,532.8 crore in revenue. Here’s what’s driving the growth in smartphones, EVs, and AI.
